prompt: Fine-tune TinyLlama/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v1.0 on a single-turn dialogue JSONL at ./data/dialogue.jsonl with 'user' and 'assistant' keys per row. Use a simple prompt template: 'USER: {user}\nASSISTANT: {assistant}'. LoRA rank 4 alpha 8 on q_proj/v_proj (small adapter, this is a fast smoke run). SFTTrainer, 1 epoch, batch size 16, lr 3e-4. Save to ./out/tinyllama-conv.

criteria.description: Runs 1 epoch on 10 synthetic samples without raising

reference_solution:
from datasets import load_dataset
from peft import LoraConfig, PeftModel
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from trl import SFTConfig, SFTTrainer

model_id = 'TinyLlama/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v1.0'
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None:
    tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

ds = load_dataset('json', data_files='./data/dialogue.jsonl', split='train')
ds = ds.map(lambda r: {'text': f"USER: {r['user']}\nASSISTANT: {r['assistant']}"})

lora = LoraConfig(r=4, lora_alpha=8, lora_dropout=0.05,
                  target_modules=['q_proj','v_proj'],
                  bias='none', task_type='CAUSAL_LM')
args = SFTConfig(output_dir='./out/tinyllama-conv',
                 per_device_train_batch_size=16, num_train_epochs=1,
                 learning_rate=3e-4, save_strategy='no')
trainer = SFTTrainer(model=model, args=args, train_dataset=ds,
                     peft_config=lora, tokenizer=tokenizer)
trainer.train()
trainer.model.save_pretrained('./out/tinyllama-conv')
_ = PeftModel.from_pretrained(model, './out/tinyllama-conv')
